description: Legal document. Bill of divorce. Dated: 143[.] Seleucid. Fragment (the upper left corner is missing). Husband: [...] b. Tamīm. Wife: [...] bt. Yaḥyā ha-Levi. The witnesses are Natan b. Shemuel ha-Ḥaver and Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi. The verso contains the acceptance of the bill of divorce by the wife, signed by witnesses Mevorakh b. Yiṣḥaq and Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. (Information from Goitein's index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
